## Checklist

- [ ] `dart format lib test example` produces no changes
- [ ] `flutter analyze --fatal-infos` passes
- [ ] `flutter test --exclude-tags=golden` passes
- [ ] Golden tests pass, or baselines updated when output changed on purpose
- [ ] Public API changes are documented and the `CHANGELOG.md` is updated
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
